steps.title: Define variables and write the area equation
steps.content:
Let w = width (feet). Since the length is 5 feet longer, length = w + 5. Using the area formula:
$$w(w + 5) = 104$$

steps.title: Expand and rearrange to standard form
Factor and solve for the dimensions
steps.content:
Find two numbers that multiply to -104 and add to 5. These are 13 and -8:
$$(w + 13)(w - 8) = 0$$
This gives w = -13 or w = 8. Since width must be positive, w = 8 feet.

Therefore, the length is w + 5 = 8 + 5 = 13 feet.
